positive: A minimalist and highly stylized illustration featuring a vibrant, stylized cosmic creature—a bioluminescent nebula fox—sitting majestically among swirling, ethereal stardust. The fox has deep indigo and sapphire fur accents, highlighted by glowing veins of teal and magenta light. The background is a deep, velvety cosmic void, rendered with subtle gradients and star field details. Use strong, graphic silhouettes and high contrast. The overall style should be neo-art deco mixed with modern fantasy illustration, designed for excellent visibility on a garment. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, utilizing clean linework and sharp color boundaries. Intricate details are confined to the bioluminescence and stardust; the main subject remains clean and graphic.
